title: The $400/Year Hidden Tax Inside Your Savings Account
hook: Your bank pays you almost nothing while inflation eats your savings alive — and they're counting on you not noticing.
angle: Traditional big-bank savings accounts quietly destroy purchasing power; switching to a high-yield account takes 10 minutes and pays 40-80x more with identical FDIC protection.
audience: Anyone with money parked in a big-bank savings account earning less than 1% APY
key_numbers: $400 lost in purchasing power per $10k per year
HYSA pays 40-80x more, still FDIC insured to $250k
